en_title: 007 First Light Budget Reportedly More Than $200 Million
cn_title: 《007初露锋芒》开发成本超2亿美元
subtitle: 史上最贵丹麦娱乐产品
opus_summary: 据丹麦媒体报道，IO Interactive开发的《007初露锋芒》开发成本超过2亿美元，耗时七年打造，成为丹麦史上最贵的娱乐产品。游戏于5月27日登陆PC、PS5和Xbox Series，发售后24小时内售出150万份，成为IO史上销售最快的游戏。IGN给出9/10评分，称其为“最好的邦德游戏”。

paragraphs.en: Developer IO Interactive's 007 First Light reportedly had a budget of more than $200 million and took seven years to make.
paragraphs.cn: 据报导，开发商IO Interactive的《007初露锋芒》开发成本超过2亿美元，耗时七年打造。

paragraphs.en: Behind-the-scenes details on the Denmark-based studio's latest were shared in a report by the Danish Broadcasting Corporation . According to the outlet, the James Bond video game was especially expensive to bring to life at 1.3 billion Danish krone (a little more than USD $202 million) to develop.
paragraphs.cn: 丹麦广播公司在一篇报导中分享了这家丹麦工作室新作的幕后细节。据该媒体称，这款詹姆斯·邦德游戏的开发成本高达13亿丹麦克朗（约合2.02亿美元），制作费用尤为高昂。

paragraphs.en: According to reporting from Denmark's TV 2 , that makes 007 First Light the most expensive entertainment product in the country's history. IO had no comment to share regarding its reported budget when contacted by IGN.
paragraphs.cn: 据丹麦TV 2报导，这使得《007初露锋芒》成为该国历史上最贵的娱乐产品。IGN联系IO时，对方未对预算传闻发表评论。

paragraphs.en: It's worth putting that $200 million figure into context. Most of the triple-A video game budgets that make headlines do so for being in the hundreds of millions of dollars range. , for example. Concord's initial development deal was around $200 million, according to a report by Kotaku . In 2023, documents submitted as part of the Xbox Federal Trade Commission case accidentally revealed The Last of Us: Part II and Horizon Forbidden West each cost more than $200 million to develop . So, in that context, 007's $200 million seems par for the course.
paragraphs.cn: 有必要将2亿美元这个数字放在大背景下看待。大多数登上头条的3A游戏预算都在数亿美元级别。例如，据Kotaku报导，《星鸣特攻》的初期开发合约约为2亿美元。2023年，Xbox联邦贸易委员会案件中提交的文件意外透露，《最后生还者 第二部》和《地平线：西之绝境》的开发成本均超过2亿美元。因此，007的2亿美元在这个背景下算是常规水平。

paragraphs.en: Some games have astronomical budgets much bigger than 007's. For example, last year the development budgets of the Call of Duty games were revealed for the first time after a court document confirmed Activision pumped $700 million into Black Ops Cold War alone, although that was over the shooter's life cycle. At the top of the tree is GTA 6, which may well be the most expensive video game ever made; parent company Take-Two is estimated to have spent $1 billion to $1.5 billion so far on its development .
paragraphs.cn: 有些游戏的预算更是天文数字，远超007。例如，去年法庭文件首次披露了《使命召唤》游戏的开发预算，确认Activision仅在《黑色行动 冷战》一款游戏上就投入了7亿美元，不过这是该射击游戏整个生命周期内的总投入。站在金字塔顶端的是《GTA6》，它很可能是有史以来最昂贵的电子游戏；其母公司Take-Two据估计已为其开发投入了10亿至15亿美元。

paragraphs.en: As for IO's development timeline for the new James Bond game, we already know the project was officially unveiled back in late 2020 . If the Danish Broadcasting Corporation's reporting is accurate, it would mean the Hitman studio had entered some form of development on the project around one year before its reveal.
paragraphs.cn: 至于IO这款新邦德游戏的开发时间线，我们已知该项目于2020年底正式公布。如果丹麦广播公司的报导准确，这意味着《杀手》工作室在项目公布前大约一年就已进入某种形式的开发阶段。

paragraphs.en: IO launched 007 First Light for PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X and S last week, May 27. It's unclear exactly what numbers the studio would need to hit to recoup its costs or how that reported $200 million budget breaks down, but we do know that it's already off to a strong start.
paragraphs.cn: IO于上周（5月27日）在PC、PS5和Xbox Series X|S上推出了《007初露锋芒》。目前尚不清楚工作室需要达到怎样的销量才能收回成本，也不清楚那2亿美元预算的具体构成，但我们已经知道它开局强劲。

paragraphs.en: On May 29, just two days after its launch, IO announced the game had already managed to become its fastest-selling game ever at 1.5 million copies sold in just 24 hours . According to Alinea Analytics head of market analysis Rhys Elliot , Valve's Steam platform accounted for 500,000 copies from that number, generating about $25 million in revenue alone.
paragraphs.cn: 5月29日，也就是发售仅两天后，IO宣布该游戏已成为其史上销售最快的作品，24小时内售出150万份。据Alinea Analytics市场分析主管Rhys Elliot称，其中Valve的Steam平台贡献了50万份，仅该平台就产生了约2500万美元（约合人民币1.79亿元）的收入。

paragraphs.en: The success of 007 First Light all arrives without the help of a Nintendo Switch 2 version, which is expected to arrive later this summer . Should IO's third-person adventure game prove successful enough, it could potentially spawn a sequel , though details on that front have not been officially mentioned quite yet.
paragraphs.cn: 《007初露锋芒》的成功尚未借助Nintendo Switch 2版本，该版本预计将于今年夏末推出。如果IO的这款第三人称冒险游戏足够成功，它可能会催生续作，不过官方尚未提及相关细节。

paragraphs.en: IGN called 007 First Light "amazing" in our 9/10 review . We said, "Demonstrably obsessed with bringing the Bond fantasy to life in a way no one has ever managed before, 007 First Light is the best Bond game I’ve ever played."
paragraphs.cn: IGN在9/10分的评测中称《007初露锋芒》「令人惊叹」。我们评价道：「《007初露锋芒》显然痴迷于以前所未有的方式将邦德幻想变为现实，这是我玩过的最好的邦德游戏。」

paragraphs.en: Our 007 First Light Guide has all the Essential Tips and Tricks you need to survive your first assignments, plus 6 Tips for Mastering Stealth so you can stay out of sight. There are plenty of achievements to unlock and collectibles to get your hands on, so check our guide to All Collectible Locations to make sure you don’t miss out. For a helping hand with your missions, head to our in-progress Walkthrough , and our guide to all the Safe Combinations and Keypad Codes .
paragraphs.cn: 我们的《007初露锋芒》攻略包含完成首次任务所需的所有基本技巧，以及6条潜行精通技巧，助你保持隐蔽。游戏中有大量成就和收集品等待解锁，请查看我们的全收集品位置指南，确保不错过任何内容。如需任务协助，请参阅我们的进行中图文攻略，以及所有保险箱密码和键盘密码指南。
